# Raritan PX-3000 Series Inline Power Meter

The PX-3000 Series of Inline Power Meters simplifies monitoring of power usage and environmental conditions in the data center while allowing you to track the power on dedicated circuits. 

## Key Features

- **No Disruption Required**: No need to remove or re-cable IT equipment - just wire the inline meter into existing circuits
- **Real-time Monitoring**: Get real-time remote power monitoring including:
  - Current (amps)
  - Voltage
  - Power (kVA, kW)
  - Energy consumption (kWh)
- **High Accuracy**: ±1% accuracy for precise power measurements
- **Plug-and-Play**: Ready with SmartSensors for easy installation and deployment
- **Single and Three-Phase Support**: Available for both single and three-phase power configurations

## Benefits

The inline meter solution allows data center operators to track power consumption without disrupting ongoing operations, making it an ideal solution for facilities that need to monitor dedicated circuits while maintaining continuous service.
